description: Paramiko is a Python (2.7, 3.x) implementation of the SSHv2 protocol, providing both client and server functionality.

documentation.example: import paramiko; c = paramiko.SSHClient(); c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy()); c.connect('10.0.0.5', username='u', password='p')

metadata.example: import paramiko; c = paramiko.SSHClient(); c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy()); c.connect('10.0.0.5', username='u', password='p')

name: paramiko
summary: SSH2 protocol library for Python (client + server).

trust.notes: Operator-curated Python library. The pip name is resolved from PyPI; the import name is verified against the registry.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
